title: call_batch duplicate-ID error path has no test
description: call_batch documents that it returns ClientError::Parse on duplicate call IDs (RFC 8620 §3.3 violation), but there is no test exercising that path. Under project testing rules all documented error paths must have tests. A server returning duplicate call IDs is not hypothetical — a misbehaving proxy could duplicate responses. The fix is: add a wiremock test that returns a batch_response.json where two invocations share the same call_id, and assert ClientError::Parse is returned.
